message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Tactical Simulator Gamepass Tier List: Best Upgrades 2026",
  description: "Master the Anime Tactical Simulator gamepass tier list for 2026. Discover which S-tier upgrades like Card Access and +2 Units Equip are worth your Gems or Robux.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Gamepass+Tier+List",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Anime Tactical Simulator gamepass tier list**: Priority is given to **+2 Units Equip** and **Card Access** for maximum efficiency.
- **Top F2P Choice**: Focus on **+2 Units Equip** first to significantly boost your late-game damage output.
- **Efficiency King**: **Card Access** allows you to open packs anywhere, even while fighting bosses or clearing minions.
- **Luck Strategy**: **Ultra Lucky** is powerful but costs 15,000 Gems, making it a lower priority for early F2P players.
- **Economy Boost**: **x2 Gold** and **x2 XP** are essential A-tier picks for faster character and account progression.
</Callout>

Navigating the various premium upgrades in Anime Tactical Simulator can be a daunting task, especially when deciding whether to spend your hard-earned Gems or Robux. The right choice can drastically accelerate your progression, while a poor investment might leave you struggling in the late-game stages. This comprehensive **anime tactical simulator gamepass tier list** is designed to help you prioritize the most impactful boosts available in 2026. Whether you are a dedicated free-to-play player saving up Gems from achievements or a player looking to optimize their Robux spend, understanding the value of each pass is crucial. In this guide, we break down every available gamepass into tiers, analyzing their cost-to-benefit ratio and how they synergize with the core mechanics of the game.

<Section icon={Trophy} title="The Ultimate Tier List Overview">

The following table provides a high-level overview of the current meta for gamepasses. We have categorized these based on their overall impact on gameplay, ease of progression, and value for money. S-tier items are considered mandatory for competitive play, while C-tier items offer negligible benefits.

| Tier | Gamepass Name | Primary Benefit | Priority |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **S** | +2 Units Equip | Increases active unit slots to 5 | **Highest** |
| **S** | Card Access | Open card packs from anywhere | **High** |
| **S** | +3 Cards Open | Summon 3 extra units per pull | **High** |
| **A** | x2 Gold | Double Yen/Gold from all sources | **Medium** |
| **A** | x2 Experience | Double XP gain for all units | **Medium** |
| **B** | Ultra Lucky | Massive boost to summon luck | **Situational** |
| **B** | VIP | 1.15x Gold and 1.05x XP bonus | **Low** |
| **C** | Mega Storage | Massive unit storage increase | **Minimal** |

**Video Highlights:**
- **Unit Slots**: Adding two extra heroes is the single best way to increase your total DPS in the late game.
- **Mobility**: Card Access is a massive quality-of-life upgrade, allowing you to stay in the action while managing your inventory.
- **F2P Path**: You can buy every single one of these gamepasses using Gems earned in-game, so prioritize wisely.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="yxNB1ZJNqBQ" title="Anime Tactical Simulator Gamepass Tier List 2026" />

<Callout type="success" title="Expert Strategy">
If you are playing as a free-to-play user, your very first Gem purchase should always be the **+2 Units Equip**. The jump from 3 units to 5 units provides nearly a 66% increase in potential damage and utility coverage.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="S-Tier Deep Dive: Must-Have Upgrades">

The S-Tier represents the "Holy Trinity" of upgrades in Anime Tactical Simulator. These passes don't just provide minor buffs; they fundamentally change how you interact with the game's systems.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="+2 Units Equip">
    - **Damage Boost**: Adds 2 extra slots for a total of 5.
    - **Synergy**: Allows for more trait combinations and elemental coverage.
    - **Late-Game**: Essential for clearing high-floor Tower challenges.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Card Access">
    - **Efficiency**: Open packs while farming bosses or minions.
    - **UI Access**: Access Shenron wishes and upgrades from anywhere.
    - **Time Saver**: Eliminates the need to walk back to the spawn area.
  </Card>
  <Card title="+3 Cards Open">
    - **Summon Speed**: Speeds up the process of finding Mythic units.
    - **Inventory**: Best when paired with high luck for massive summoning sessions.
    - **Value**: Relatively cheap at 2,500 Gems for the benefit provided.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

The **Card Access** pass is often underrated by newer players, but as you reach the mid-game, the ability to open packs while standing at a boss spawn is invaluable. This prevents downtime and ensures you are always progressing your unit collection even while grinding for materials.

| Gamepass | Gem Cost | Robux Cost | Impact Level |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| +2 Units Equip | 4,000 | 399 | Game-Changing |
| Card Access | 7,000 | 699 | High Utility |
| +3 Cards Open | 2,500 | 249 | Progression Speed |

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Tip">
Check your Achievements menu regularly. Clearing 11 floors of the Tower unlocks an additional card ticket, which stacks beautifully with the **+3 Cards Open** gamepass for even faster summoning.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Economy and Experience: A-Tier Value">

Once you have secured your extra unit slots, your focus should shift toward the economy. The A-tier passes are designed to reduce the "grind" factor of the game.

**x2 Gold (Yen)** is arguably the most important economy pass. In Anime Tactical Simulator, Yen is the bottleneck for almost every upgrade, including unit levels and trait rerolls. Doubling your income effectively halves the time you spend farming low-level mobs.

**x2 Experience** ensures that when you do pull a new Mythic or Secret unit, you can get them battle-ready in a fraction of the time. While you can use XP potions, having a permanent 2x multiplier is much more sustainable for long-term play.

| Pass Name | Best For | Why Buy? |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| x2 Gold | All Players | Essential for trait rerolls and upgrades |
| x2 Experience | New Players | Rapidly levels up new summons for endgame |

<Callout type="info">
The **VIP** pass is often mistaken for an A-tier item, but its multipliers (1.15x Gold and 1.05x XP) are significantly lower than the dedicated 2x passes. Only buy VIP if you want the golden nametag or have extra Gems after the main passes.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Luck and Rerolls: The B-Tier Gamble">

Luck gamepasses are a controversial topic in the **anime tactical simulator gamepass tier list**. While everyone wants better RNG, the cost of these passes can be prohibitive.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Evaluate Your Gems">
    Before buying Ultra Lucky (15,000 Gems), ensure you have all S and A tier passes.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Stacking Luck">
    Luck passes (Lucky, Super, and Ultra) do stack. Buying all three provides the highest possible pull rates.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Fast Rerolls">
    Only purchase Fast Rerolls if you are planning to spend thousands of Gems on trait optimization.
  </Step>
</Steps>

The Ultra Lucky pass is the most expensive item in the shop. For a free-to-play player, 15,000 Gems represents a massive time investment. According to veteran players at [Deltia's Gaming](https://deltiasgaming.com/roblox-anime-tactical-simulator-gamepass-tier-list/), it is often better to spend those gems on more unit slots or speed upgrades before chasing the marginal gains of Ultra Luck.

<Callout type="warning" title="Watch Your Wallet">
Do not buy **Fast Spins** or **Fast Rerolls** with Robux. These are luxury items that only save a few seconds of animation time and provide zero statistical advantage in combat.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Storage and Utility: The C-Tier Skips">

Finally, we have the utility passes that most players should avoid until the absolute end-game.

**Mega and Small Storage** increase your unit capacity. However, since the game allows you to delete or fodder low-tier units easily, you should rarely find your inventory full if you manage it properly. 4,000 Gems for Mega Storage is a steep price for something that can be managed with basic inventory cleaning.

| Gamepass | Cost | Why it's C-Tier |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Mega Storage | 4,000 Gems | Inventory management is free |
| Small Storage | 500 Gems | Very low impact on gameplay |
| Fast Spins | 2,000 Gems | Purely cosmetic animation speed |

<Callout type="tip" title="Inventory Management">
Instead of buying storage, get into the habit of "Auto-Deleting" Rare and Uncommon units during your summon sessions. This keeps your inventory clean and saves your Gems for more important upgrades.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="Final Summary and FAQ">

To wrap up your journey through the **anime tactical simulator gamepass tier list**, use this checklist to track your progress and ensure you are spending your resources on the right upgrades.

<Checklist
  id="gamepass-goals"
  title="Purchase Priority Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Unlock +2 Units Equip (Priority #1)",
    "Obtain Card Access for remote management",
    "Secure x2 Gold for better economy",
    "Buy +3 Cards Open to speed up summoning",
    "Invest in x2 XP for faster unit leveling",
    "Save for Ultra Lucky only during end-game"
  ]}
/>

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "Can I get all gamepasses for free in Anime Tactical Simulator?",
    answer: "Yes! Every gamepass can be purchased using Gems, which are earned through achievements, challenges, and gameplay. You do not need to spend Robux."
  },
  {
    question: "Does the +2 Units Equip stack with Tower rewards?",
    answer: "Yes. You can get additional slots from the Tower mode, and the gamepass adds two more on top of whatever you have unlocked through gameplay."
  },
  {
    question: "Is VIP worth it for the XP boost?",
    answer: "Generally, no. The 1.05x XP boost is very small compared to the 2x Experience gamepass. It is better to buy the 2x pass first."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the best way to farm Gems for these passes?",
    answer: "Focus on completing your Daily Achievements and pushing as high as possible in the Tower. These provide the most consistent Gem income for F2P players."
  }
]} />

</Section>
